blended.narrative: Discovery is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 17.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
